diagrams.title: Euler's Formula Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between vertices (n), edges (m), and faces (f) in a cube unfolded flat
diagrams.purpose: Understand Euler's formula through a familiar 3D shape

diagrams.title: K5 Non-Planar
diagrams.description: Complete graph on 5 vertices - shows why edges must cross
elements: Demonstrates at least one crossing unavoidable
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why K5 cannot be drawn without crossings

diagrams.title: K3,3 Non-Planar
diagrams.description: Complete bipartite graph with 3+3 vertices showing crossing requirement
elements: Shows crossing when drawn in plane

diagrams.title: K4 Planar
diagrams.description: Complete graph on 4 vertices drawn without crossings
elements: Can be drawn as tetrahedron or flat with one interior edge
diagrams.purpose: Show complete graph K4 is planar

diagrams.title: Dual Graph Construction
diagrams.description: Shows original graph faces and corresponding dual vertices with edges
elements: Dual vertices placed in each face

diagrams.title: Adjacency Matrix Representation
diagrams.description: Shows 4-vertex graph and its adjacency matrix

diagrams.title: Adjacency List Representation
diagrams.description: Shows same graph with linked list per vertex
elements: Shows space efficiency for sparse graphs
